'''dhamoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaffir|zaffir]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaffir|zaffir]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhamoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmereth|dhæmereth]] || [[word:dhæmerej|dhæmerej]] || [[word:dhæmeresh|dhæmeresh]] || [[word:dhæmere|dhæmere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamomoroth|dhamomoroth]] || [[word:dhamomoroj|dhamomoroj]] || [[word:dhamomorosh|dhamomorosh]] || [[word:dhamomoro|dhamomoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamoroth|dhamoroth]] || [[word:dhamoroj|dhamoroj]] || [[word:dhamorosh|dhamorosh]] || [[word:dhamoro|dhamoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamofroth|dhamofroth]] || [[word:dhamofroj|dhamofroj]] || [[word:dhamofrosh|dhamofrosh]] || [[word:dhamofrof|dhamofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamorotho|dhamorotho]] || [[word:dhamorojo|dhamorojo]] || [[word:dhamorosho|dhamorosho]] || [[word:dhamoroko|dhamoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamoroth|dhamoroth]] || [[word:dhamoroj|dhamoroj]] || [[word:dhamorosh|dhamorosh]] || [[word:dhamoro|dhamoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamorothol|dhamorothol]] || [[word:dhamorojol|dhamorojol]] || [[word:dhamoroshol|dhamoroshol]] || [[word:dhamorokol|dhamorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamorothotho|dhamorothotho]] || [[word:dhamorojojo|dhamorojojo]] || [[word:dhamoroshosho|dhamoroshosho]] || [[word:dhamoroko|dhamoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamorothon|dhamorothon]] || [[word:dhamorojon|dhamorojon]] || [[word:dhamoroshon|dhamoroshon]] || [[word:dhamorokon|dhamorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamorothoro|dhamorothoro]] || [[word:dhamorojoro|dhamorojoro]] || [[word:dhamoroshoro|dhamoroshoro]] || [[word:dhamorokoro|dhamorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
